title: Focal shader
description: Bring your Minecraft world to life with Focal Shader — enhancing graphics, lighting, and realism while keeping smooth performance.
body:
### Let me quickly list the features

Experience realistic graphics, reflections, and PBR textures with Focal Shader — optimized for both high-end and low-end devices.

### Key Settings

High Graphics Quality – Brings your Minecraft world to life with stunning visuals.

Realistic Reflections – Adds lifelike water and surface reflections for immersive gameplay.

PBR Support – Fully compatible with Physically Based Rendering (PBR) texture packs.

Low-End Device Friendly – Optimized settings ensure smooth performance even on weaker systems.

Balanced Performance – Offers a mix of beauty and efficiency, perfect for casual or competitive players.


## Supported Versions

Minecraft 1.19.2

Minecraft 1.19.1

Minecraft 1.21.4

### Why Choose Focal Shader?

Focal Shader combines realistic lighting, reflections, and textures while still being accessible for players with lower-end PCs or laptops. Whether you’re building, exploring, or just enjoying survival mode, this shader will make your game look cinematic and vibrant.

I created this Focal shader using expressions from @bobcao3
